content.en:
Aromu Fortress.

Tai Hori, who used to be the second on the emperor list, and Mo Yan, who was the third on the emperor list, knew that Ye Tian was on the second place on the emperor list of the Luo Mu Fortress at this moment, and they were a little incredulous for a while.

They have occupied this position for countless years, and they have always been the second and third ranking, and other Emperor List powerhouses cannot threaten their status at all.

But now, Ye Tian directly surpassed them from the not very high ranking of the emperor list, which was like being surpassed by an unknown guy, how could they stand it?

Soon.

Tai Hori came to Ye Tian, he wanted to challenge Ye Tian and regain the second place on the Emperor List.

After all, once the battle between the emperor list is won, it can also surpass the opponent's ranking, but there are few challenges between the strong people on the emperor list.

......

"Taihori wants to challenge me!"

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

This guy is not simple, he is a descendant of an ultimate ancient demon, and his background is very extraordinary, and he doesn't want to offend such a guy.

But now that his ranking on the emperor list has surpassed the other party, it will undoubtedly make the other party very unhappy.

Therefore, this battle is estimated to be difficult to avoid.

And it's not just Tai Hori, but also Mo Yan and other top ten powerhouses on the emperor list, maybe they want to challenge him too, and he can't avoid these people at all.

If you want them not to bother themselves, you must let them know their strength and let them give up the challenge automatically.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian agreed to Taihori's challenge, and this challenge was an open battle.

Aromu Fortress, a battlefield.

Ye Tian and Tai Hori both came here, as well as countless emperor-level powerhouses and a group of ancient demon-level powerhouses, all of whom came to watch this battle.

Although Ye Tian has reached the second place on the Emperor List, the ranking of the Emperor List does not necessarily represent strength, after all, Taihori has not fought for a long time, and the ranking of the Emperor List is ranked according to the strength played in battle.

Therefore, Ye Tian is not necessarily stronger than Tai Hori.

And there is also a bet on the battle between Ye Tian and Tai Hori, after all, if there is no bet, Ye Tian will not casually agree to the challenge.

And the stake is 2 million record points.

For a powerhouse like Tai Hori, he doesn't know how many battle points he has accumulated over the years, even if he consumes a lot, it's still no problem to take out millions of battle points in his hands.

Rumble!!!!

On the battlefield, Ye Tian and Tai Hori immediately cast the second form of the form secret method.

Ye Tian's form secret method is the true Lin form, while Tai Hori's form secret method is the eternal form, and the second form of the eternal form is the indestructible form, which has terrifying self-healing abilities.

Even the Emperor List powerhouse who was stronger than him would be difficult to defeat him, which was why he had the confidence to defeat Ye Tian.

"Kill.~!"

Ye Tian and Tai Hori fought, and directly unleashed the power of the Arrow Mother Blade and the Ultimate Rule Realm.

He wants to show all his strength and defeat Taihori in a crushing style, and he doesn't want to waste time.

Rumble!

Taihori's body was cut open, and even other positions were cracked, but he recovered quickly, but his face was pale and a little unsightly.

"Ultimate Rules Realm, Top Ultimate Arcane!"

Tai Hori realized that he might really not be Ye Tian's opponent, after all, Ye Tian's strength was too terrifying.

Rumble!

The Ultimate Rule Realm erupts in full force and attacks Taihori again.

Taihori tried to dodge, but his body moved too slowly due to the power of the Ultimate Rule Realm, and he was hit hard by a sword.

With his immortal form, he had only recovered some of his injuries, but if he continued like this, he would definitely not be able to hold on.

And the group of emperor-level powerhouses and ancient demon-level powerhouses who were watching were all dumbfounded.

"Tian has actually comprehended the Ultimate Rule Realm, this is a power that only a top Ancient Demon level powerhouse has!"

"Tai Hori is indeed very strong, but it's a pity that he was defeated, and he didn't talk about it at all!"

"Yes, Tai Hori's eternal form has been cultivated to the perfection of the second form, and he has also comprehended the top ultimate arcane, and his physical body is also extremely terrifying, but it is still too far behind Ye Tian. "

"As soon as the Ultimate Rule Realm comes out, Taihori has no power to resist, and it seems that only Amusha, one of the Emperor List, has any hope of defeating Heaven!"

"Amusha's strength is terrifying, but there is no hope for the ancient demon level, what's the point, and the sky is different, he has only cultivated one secret form, and he has also comprehended the ultimate rule realm. If you hit the ancient demon realm now, it should be easy to break through. "

Countless emperors were envious of Ye Tian.

And the dragon warriors of the dragon disciple tribe and other ancient demon-level powerhouses were also dumbfounded, they knew that Ye Tian was powerful, but they didn't expect it to be so powerful!

As for the two emperor powerhouses who had fought with Ye Tian, Aoi and Wei, they were even more trembling, if they had met Ye Tian with such strength, they would definitely be killed in one move, without any power to resist.

Fortunately, they are now all subordinate to the main department of the mother of Aluo, and they are not allowed to kill each other, otherwise they are afraid that they would have died a long time ago.

......

"I throw in the towel!"

Taihori admits defeat.

Most of the ultimate particles in his body had been destroyed, and if he didn't admit defeat again, even the second form of the eternal form would not be able to keep him alive.

Seeing Tai Hori admit defeat, Ye Tian also stopped, and then turned around and left.

"Remember to give me 2 million points!"

Ye Tian said.

"Okay!" Tai Hori replied, and then transferred 2 million battle points to Ye Tian.

After obtaining these 2 million battle points, Ye Tian's battle points exceeded 10 million points, and he went to exchange for a piece of the ultimate ancient demon Aroye as soon as possible.

Soon, the redemption was complete.

Several ancient demon-level powerhouses personally escorted this piece of scale and delivered it to Ye Tian's hands.

Ye (Li Qian's) Tian took this scale, returned to his residence, and then began to study it.

"It is worthy of being a scale of the Ultimate Ancient Demon, and the aura contained in it is too terrifying!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In his time, he had also sensed the breath of the Ultimate Ancient Demon, but now it was the first time that he had sensed the breath of the Ultimate Ancient Demon up close.

Although it was just a scale, Ye Tian sensed unimaginable life patterns and powers from this scale, and even many ultimate arcane powers.

In the following years, Ye Tian began to continuously analyze and comprehend the power contained in this scale, so as to enhance his strength in all aspects.

After a while.

Ye Tian finally created his first peak ultimate arcane, and this peak ultimate arcane was actually perfected from the armor of Aromu.

Therefore, this pinnacle ultimate arcane is still called the armor of the Arrowmu!
